title: poa angustifolia var. sublanata
intro: Poa angustifolia var. sublanata, a variety of the slender poa grass, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. Poa angustifolia var. sublanata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
